items.title: FIFA: Iran's WC status unchanged amid absence
items.summary: FIFA president Gianni Infantino reiterated Thursday that Iran will take part in the World Cup and play its originally scheduled matches in the United States.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Andreeva beats Baptiste to reach first Madrid final
items.summary: Teenager Mirra Andreeva reaches her first Madrid Open final with a 6-4 7-6 (10-8) victory over Hailey Baptiste.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Liverpool Releases Statement On Mo Salah's Farewell After Muscle Injury
